SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.control

Interface ProofControl

All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractProofControl, DefaultProofControl, MediatorProofControl
public interface ProofControl
A ProofControl provides the user interface independent logic to apply rules on a proof. This includes:
  • Functionality to reduce the available rules (isMinimizeInteraction() and setMinimizeInteraction(boolean)).
  • Functionality to list available rules.
  • Functionality to apply a rule interactively.
  • Functionality to apply rules by the auto mode synchronous or asynchronously in a different Thread.
  • Functionality to execute a macro.

    Description
    void

    void
    applyInteractive(RuleApp app, Goal goal)
    Apply a RuleApp and continue with update simplification or strategy application according to current settings.
    ImmutableList<BuiltInRule>
    getBuiltInRule(Goal focusedGoal, PosInOccurrence pos)
    collects all built-in rules that are applicable at the given sequent position 'pos'.
    ProverTaskListener
    getDefaultProverTaskListener()
    Returns the default ProverTaskListener which will be added to all started ApplyStrategy instances.
    ImmutableList<TacletApp>
    getFindTaclet(Goal focusedGoal, PosInOccurrence pos)
    collects all applicable FindTaclets of the current goal (called by the SequentViewer)
    ImmutableList<TacletApp>

    collects all applicable NoFindTaclets of the current goal (called by the SequentViewer)

    collects all applicable RewriteTaclets of the current goal (called by the SequentViewer)

    Checks if the auto mode is currently running.

    selected rule to apply

    void
    setMinimizeInteraction(boolean minimizeInteraction)
     
    void
    startAndWaitForAutoMode(Proof proof)
    Starts the auto mode for the given proof which must be contained in this user interface and blocks the current thread until it has finished.
    void
    startAndWaitForAutoMode(Proof proof, ImmutableList<Goal> goals)
    Starts the auto mode for the given proof which must be contained in this user interface and blocks the current thread until it has finished.
    void
    startAutoMode(Proof proof)
    Starts the auto mode for the given Proof.
    void
    startAutoMode(Proof proof, ImmutableList<Goal> goals)
    Starts the auto mode for the given Proof and the given Goals.
    void
    startFocussedAutoMode(PosInOccurrence focus, Goal goal)
     
    void
    stopAndWaitAutoMode()
    Stops the currently running auto mode and blocks the current Thread until auto mode has stopped.
    void
    stopAutoMode()
    Requests to stop the current auto mode without blocking the current Thread until the auto mode has stopped.
    void
    waitWhileAutoMode()
    Blocks the current Thread while the auto mode of this UserInterfaceControl is active.

  • Method Details

    • isMinimizeInteraction

      boolean isMinimizeInteraction()

    • setMinimizeInteraction

      void setMinimizeInteraction(boolean minimizeInteraction)

    • getRewriteTaclet

      ImmutableList<TacletApp> getRewriteTaclet(Goal focusedGoal, PosInOccurrence pos)
      collects all applicable RewriteTaclets of the current goal (called by the SequentViewer)
      Returns:
      a list of Taclets with all applicable RewriteTaclets

    • getFindTaclet

      ImmutableList<TacletApp> getFindTaclet(Goal focusedGoal, PosInOccurrence pos)
      collects all applicable FindTaclets of the current goal (called by the SequentViewer)
      Returns:
      a list of Taclets with all applicable FindTaclets

    • getNoFindTaclet

      ImmutableList<TacletApp> getNoFindTaclet(Goal focusedGoal)
      collects all applicable NoFindTaclets of the current goal (called by the SequentViewer)
      Returns:
      a list of Taclets with all applicable NoFindTaclets

    • getBuiltInRule

      ImmutableList<BuiltInRule> getBuiltInRule(Goal focusedGoal, PosInOccurrence pos)
      collects all built-in rules that are applicable at the given sequent position 'pos'.
      Parameters:
      pos - the PosInSequent where to look for applicable rules

    • selectedTaclet

      boolean selectedTaclet(Taclet taclet, Goal goal, PosInOccurrence pos)

    • applyInteractive

      void applyInteractive(RuleApp app, Goal goal)
      Apply a RuleApp and continue with update simplification or strategy application according to current settings.
      Parameters:
      app -
      goal -

    • selectedBuiltInRule

      void selectedBuiltInRule(Goal goal, BuiltInRule rule, PosInOccurrence pos, boolean forced, boolean interactive)
      selected rule to apply
      Parameters:
      rule - the selected built-in rule
      pos - the PosInSequent describes the position where to apply the rule
      forced - a boolean indicating that if the rule is complete or can be made complete automatically then the rule should be applied automatically without asking the user at all (e.g. if a loop invariant is available do not ask the user to provide one)
      interactive - whether the rule was applied by the user

    • getDefaultProverTaskListener

      ProverTaskListener getDefaultProverTaskListener()
      Returns the default ProverTaskListener which will be added to all started ApplyStrategy instances.
      Returns:
      The default ProverTaskListener which will be added to all started ApplyStrategy instances.

    • addAutoModeListener

      void addAutoModeListener(AutoModeListener p)

    • removeAutoModeListener

      void removeAutoModeListener(AutoModeListener p)

    • isAutoModeSupported

      boolean isAutoModeSupported(Proof proof)
      Checks if the auto mode of this UserInterfaceControl supports the given Proof.
      Parameters:
      proof - The Proof to check.
      Returns:
      true auto mode support proofs, false auto mode don't support proof.

    • isInAutoMode

      boolean isInAutoMode()
      Checks if the auto mode is currently running.
      Returns:
      true auto mode is running, false auto mode is not running.

    • startAutoMode

      void startAutoMode(Proof proof)
      Starts the auto mode for the given Proof.
      Parameters:
      proof - The Proof to start auto mode of.

    • startAutoMode

      void startAutoMode(Proof proof, ImmutableList<Goal> goals)
      Starts the auto mode for the given Proof and the given Goals.
      Parameters:
      proof - The Proof to start auto mode of.
      goals - The Goals to close.

    • stopAutoMode

      void stopAutoMode()
      Requests to stop the current auto mode without blocking the current Thread until the auto mode has stopped.

    • stopAndWaitAutoMode

      void stopAndWaitAutoMode()
      Stops the currently running auto mode and blocks the current Thread until auto mode has stopped.

    • waitWhileAutoMode

      void waitWhileAutoMode()
      Blocks the current Thread while the auto mode of this UserInterfaceControl is active.

    • startAndWaitForAutoMode

      void startAndWaitForAutoMode(Proof proof, ImmutableList<Goal> goals)
      Starts the auto mode for the given proof which must be contained in this user interface and blocks the current thread until it has finished.
      Parameters:
      proof - The Proof to start auto mode and to wait for.
      goals - The Goals to close.

    • startAndWaitForAutoMode

      void startAndWaitForAutoMode(Proof proof)
      Starts the auto mode for the given proof which must be contained in this user interface and blocks the current thread until it has finished.
      Parameters:
      proof - The Proof to start auto mode and to wait for.

    • startFocussedAutoMode

      void startFocussedAutoMode(PosInOccurrence focus, Goal goal)

    • runMacro

      void runMacro(Node node, ProofMacro macro, PosInOccurrence posInOcc)
      Runs the given ProofMacro at the given PosInOccurrence on the given Node.
      Parameters:
      node - The Node to start macro at.
      macro - The ProofMacro to execute.
      posInOcc - The exact PosInOccurrence at which the ProofMacro is started at.
